reason: The remediation only creates a custom crypto policy file and runs update-crypto-policies, which does not modify bootloader, partitions, or kernel parameters. The selected SSH ciphers are standard and widely supported, minimizing risk of lockout. No reboot is required.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential SSH compatibility issues if client does not support selected ciphers; Affected services may need restart to apply new crypto policy
